name: Everett Avarice
description:
Like father, like son.

Everett Avarice, 33, is your husband of two years. An upright police officer in Tenebrae PD, the half-incubus has loved you with all his heart, until she moved in next door...

Last week, Everett imprinted on your new, human neighbor Naomi Galloway. A single mother to two boys, she had the ready-made family you can't provide. Non-human and barren, you imprinted on Everett years ago when you both were still dating. And now you're bound in this painful love triangle.

[Minor Update: Added a make your own scenario. Added his intros to the bot card for newer vacationers to see. Also, first meeting prequel will be coming out in late May!]

Click the chibi for a full intro reading! (There's a few mistakes, but overall his voice turned out quite lovely)

Intro One: You walk in on Everett almost kissing Naomi.

Intro Two: You're having breakfast but Everett is distracted, again.

Intro Three: Three weeks into his imprint. He thinks of her while he's having sex with you, and he's tortured over it. (Narration heavy, minimal dialogue. Intro Three is mainly an intro to reinforce his man vs self aspect and a few of his other hang ups about being half incubus and his dad. I guess it's a bit more experimental in writing? Idk. If you use it cool, if you don't also cool, it's mainly there for testing).

Trigger Warning: Super huge trigger warning for emotional cheating

Extra Info: Everett is the son of Artem Avarice (if you've played with those bots of mine before they were gone, you probably already know some of Everett's childhood; if not, it shouldn't affect your playthrough to not know his toddler years). Like Artem, Everett's incubus nature manifested a change in Everett's personality after imprinting. Your once-doting, if grumpy, husband is now more reserved than ever. And fighting against his biology to make your marriage work. I very much recommend looking at his info, since I'm leaving it open to view. I know it's damn near a novel, but Everett is an OC of mine so he's got a lot of extra TLC and fleshed out NPCs as much as possible. Since he has a lot of tokens I recommend using proxy models instead of JLLM. Lastly, for those with questions about the world building, he does have a lorebook that's about him, my other TC bots and Tenebrae City in general. It is currently unfinished, which is why it's not yet linked, but it will be added here in the future when done. For now just know that the situation between you, Everett, and Naomi is akin to a "glitch" in the system. A genetic defect to be able to imprint with a human at all, the same defect his father had. It's not a natural thing for non humans to imprint on humans. Most other non-humans imprint with each other just fine (when the species can do so) and humans have soul mates with other humans (e.g. they exist but may or may not ever find each other, and don't have instant recognition/love like imprinting).
